meaning: n.(商船失事时) 系浮标投海的货物
examples: The Titanic’s birthplace on the River Lagan is now called the Titanic Quarter (above).
The Titanic's birthplace on the River Lagan is now called the Titanic Quarter (above).
Belfast is the capital of Northern Ireland, on the River Lagan, at its entrance to Belfast Lough.
The Lagan fraud was made public last July and the criminal investigation is ongoing.
The Lagan Valley risk assesment report highlighted "considerable" dangers, including difficulties in recruiting surgical staff.
